For the 28 day challenge, the sales structure is exactly the same as it is in the modules for the six week or 42 day sale. You're still going to go through bringing your rapport, you're still going to go through finding their goals, bringing the pain, finding out what they've done in the past, the three pillar approach, the reason closed and then you're going to go to the pitch. The only thing that's different is you're selling them 28 days and the price might be a little different. Even then, they don't care about the length of the term of the program, they care about the result you've promised in the sale. Nothing changes besides the actual price you're going to charge them. We will have a different contract for you below, but everything else is exactly the same. If you have any questions, reference those trainings, please watch those and just as a tip from one gym owner to the next, you should be listening to those trainings every single day you have sales and maybe the other days. They can only help you, but nothing changes for the 28 day sale.
